message:
Command `MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
DEF_TEMPLATE="$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/fixed_dont_change/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def"

echo "=== DEF template PINS section (first 30 lines) ==="
grep -A30 "^PINS" "$DEF_TEMPLATE" | head -40

echo ""
echo "=== Wrapper netlist: all top-level port names ==="
grep "^  inout\|^  input\|^  output" \
  "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v" | \
  awk '{print $2}' | tr -d ',' | sort > /tmp/wrapper_ports.txt
wc -l /tmp/wrapper_ports.txt
echo ""

echo "=== DEF template: all PIN names ==="
grep "^\s*- " "$DEF_TEMPLATE" | grep -v "COMP\|NET\|ROW\|TRACK" | \
  awk '{print $2}' | sort > /tmp/def_pins.txt
head -5 /tmp/def_pins.txt
wc -l /tmp/def_pins.txt` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments: {"query": "OpenROAD GlobalPlacement error GPL-0326 toplevel port not placed. How to fix unplaced ports in LibreLane OpenLane flow? FP_DEF_TEMPLATE permissive mode port placement issue."}
function.name: query_ragflow

function.arguments:
{"command": "MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
DEF_TEMPLATE="$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/fixed_dont_change/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def"

echo "=== DEF template PINS section (first 30 lines) ==="
grep -A30 "^PINS" "$DEF_TEMPLATE" | head -40

echo ""
echo "=== Wrapper netlist: all top-level port names ==="
grep "^  inout\|^  input\|^  output" \
  "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v" | \
  awk '{print $2}' | tr -d ',' | sort > /tmp/wrapper_ports.txt
wc -l /tmp/wrapper_ports.txt
echo ""

echo "=== DEF template: all PIN names ==="
grep "^\s*- " "$DEF_TEMPLATE" | grep -v "COMP\|NET\|ROW\|TRACK" | \
  awk '{print $2}' | sort > /tmp/def_pins.txt
head -5 /tmp/def_pins.txt
wc -l /tmp/def_pins.txt", "timeout": 20}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
=== DEF template PINS section (first 30 lines) ===
PINS 1381 ;
   - vddio_S_0_vddio + NET vddio_S_0_vddio
      + DIRECTION INOUT
      + USE SIGNAL
      + PORT
        + LAYER met3 ( -11950 -1200 ) ( 11950 1200 )
        + PLACED ( 106995 1200 ) N ;
   - vddio_S_0_vddio + NET vddio_S_0_vddio
      + DIRECTION INOUT
      + USE SIGNAL
      + PORT
        + LAYER met3 ( -11950 -1200 ) ( 11950 1200 )
        + PLACED ( 156890 1200 ) N ;
   - vddio_S_1_vddio + NET vddio_S_1_vddio
      + DIRECTION INOUT
      + USE SIGNAL
      + PORT
        + LAYER met3 ( -11950 -1200 ) ( 11950 1200 )
        + PLACED ( 286995 1200 ) N ;
   - vddio_S_1_vddio + NET vddio_S_1_vddio
      + DIRECTION INOUT
      + USE SIGNAL
      + PORT
        + LAYER met3 ( -11950 -1200 ) ( 11950 1200 )
        + PLACED ( 336890 1200 ) N ;
   - vddio_S_2_vddio + NET vddio_S_2_vddio
      + DIRECTION INOUT
      + USE SIGNAL
      + PORT
        + LAYER met3 ( -11950 -1200 ) ( 11950 1200 )
        + PLACED ( 466995 1200 ) N ;

=== Wrapper netlist: all top-level port names ===
0 /tmp/wrapper_ports.txt

=== DEF template: all PIN names ===
0 /tmp/def_pins.txt
